sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59106" key="kori/acos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κορίαξος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n59106.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fish</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.12</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
